_**Agent (default)**_

**"NEW RELEASE" is hardcoded in the UI.** It is not taken from the API.

It’s rendered as the literal string `"New release"` in the hero overlay; `heroBadgeText` uses `textTransform: 'uppercase'`, so it shows as **NEW RELEASE**.

```311:314:streamlist/src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx
            <View style={styles.heroOverlay} pointerEvents="box-none">
              <View style={styles.heroBadge} accessibilityElementsHidden>
                <Text style={styles.heroBadgeText}>New release</Text>
```

**What *does* come from responses:** the spotlight `heroMovie` (first result from trending, or top rated, or discover, etc.) and the built description, title, and image. Only the small badge label is static.
